description: An operator at a gold plant manages the elution circuit, which strips the gold from the loaded carbon into a solution.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the temperature and flow rate of the elution solution being pumped through the carbon column.

expected_outcome.expected: The operator confirms the elution circuit is running at its target parameters.

nodes.task_description: Take samples of the solution exiting the column to check the gold grade.

expected_outcome.expected: The samples are taken to monitor the progress of the elution.

nodes.task_description: When the gold grade in the exiting solution drops to a low level, determine that the elution is complete and switch the flow to the next column.

expected_outcome.expected: The elution cycle is completed successfully, and the operator begins the cycle on the next batch of loaded carbon.
